import React from "react"; import { useInstitutionAuth } from "../hooks/useInstitutionAuth"; import { useMetaMask } from "../hooks/useMetaMask"; import "./IssuerPortal.css"; export default function IssuerPortal() { const { current, loading, authError, signUp, signIn, signOut, setWalletForCurrent } = useInstitutionAuth(); const { connect, disconnect, isAvailable, account, chainId, shortAccount } = useMetaMask(); const handleSignUp = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const form = e.target; const displayName = form.displayName.value.trim(); const email = form.email.value.trim(); const password = form.password.value.trim(); await signUp(email, password, displayName); }; const handleSignIn = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const form = e.target; const email = form.email.value.trim(); const password = form.password.value.trim(); await signIn(email, password); }; const handleLinkWallet = async () => { if (!current || !account) return; await setWalletForCurrent(account); }; return (
